<!--
Title your PR:  Add <project> to Built with zk-X509

This PR should add ONE entry to the PROJECTS array in
frontend/app/built-with/projects.ts. Fill in the checklist below.
-->

## Add a project to "Built with zk-X509"

**Project name:**

**Category:** <!-- one of: DeFi · DAO & Governance · Identity · Gaming · Infrastructure -->

**Networks (chain IDs):** <!-- e.g. 11155111 (Sepolia), 1 (Mainnet) -->

**Status:** <!-- live | building -->

**Service URL:**

**Audience (optional):**

**Owner wallet (optional, required to self-manage):** <!-- 0x… -->

**One- or two-sentence description (what it is + how it uses zk-X509):**

### Checklist
- [ ] Added/updated exactly one entry in `PROJECTS` in `frontend/app/built-with/projects.ts`
- [ ] `category` is one of the allowed `CATEGORIES`
- [ ] `chains` are chain IDs as strings (e.g. `["11155111"]`)
- [ ] The project genuinely uses zk-X509 for on-chain identity
- [ ] If `owner` is set: generated `signature` via **Sign listing** on `/built-with` (an edit must be re-signed by the owner wallet)
